subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the events and experiences in the author’s childhood
Identify the main ideas and sequence of events
Develop basic comprehension and summarization skills
Recognize the author’s feelings and reflections
Learn and use new vocabulary from the chapter

lesson_plan.title: Introduction and Context
topics_covered: Author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam and his early life
Setting and context of childhood experiences
Importance of childhood memories and experiences
teaching_strategy: Teacher-led discussion about childhood and experiences
Board notes highlighting context and author background
student_activities: Share their own memorable childhood experiences
Predict events in the chapter based on title
assessment: Oral questions on author and context

lesson_plan.title: Reading – Early Life and Family
topics_covered: Initial experiences that shaped his personality
student_activities: Underline sentences describing family and habits

lesson_plan.title: Experiences and Learnings
topics_covered: Values learned from family and society
teaching_strategy: Teacher-led discussion on experiences and learning
Explain key incidents and their significance
student_activities: Discuss the values learned from each incident

lesson_plan.title: Character and Personality Traits
topics_covered: Influence of family and environment on personality
teaching_strategy: Board diagram of personality traits and influences
student_activities: List traits of the author from the text
Write a short paragraph on which trait they admire most

lesson_plan.title: Summary and Themes
topics_covered: Main ideas and sequence of events
Themes: family, values, learning, and curiosity
Writing a simple summary of the chapter
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of themes and main points
student_activities: Write a 6–8 sentence summary of the chapter
Identify main themes from the text

lesson_plan.title: Vocabulary and Reflection
topics_covered: Important words and expressions from the chapter
Applying lessons from the chapter in daily life
teaching_strategy: Board explanation of vocabulary and usage
Discussion prompts for reflection and personal connection
student_activities: List new words with meanings and use in sentences
Write a short reflective paragraph about their own childhood
Class discussion on values learned from childhood

teaching_aids: Diagram of personality traits and sequence of events
teacher_tip: Encourage students to relate the author’s childhood experiences to their own, and discuss the values and lessons learned in simple terms.
